name: Shaved Fennel and Blood Orange Salad
description: Thinly shaved fennel with blood orange segments, olive oil, and lemon — a bright, crunchy winter salad.
recipeIngredient: 1 large (or 2 small) fennel bulb, very thinly shaved
2 blood oranges, segmented (or sliced into rounds)
Flaky salt and freshly ground black pepper
Fennel fronds or mint, for garnish (optional)
recipeInstructions: Shave the fennel as thinly as possible (a mandoline helps) and segment the blood oranges, catching any juice.
Arrange fennel and orange on a platter; drizzle with olive oil, lemon juice, and any orange juice.
Season with flaky salt and pepper; scatter fronds/mint (and olives if using). Serve right away.
author: Smitten Kitchen
